arts.ttl: Romeu has ‘small hope’ he can face Barca as Girona consider paying ‘fear clause’
arts.sum: Romeu spoke about the possibility of featuring on Sunday and hasn’t given up hope he could be involved. The midfielder was set to miss out due to a ‘fear clause’ in his loan deal, but Girona are said to be willing to pay a €300,000 fee which would allow Romeu to feature.
